ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Slug for the symbol (e.g., coffeecoin for CFC) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cryptocurrency (e.g., coin, token) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the symbol was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the symbol was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange the data was collected from */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol the data belongs to */,
  "time_unix" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, CSV) */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the price belongs to */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volume entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the volume belongs to */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volumes_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketcaps" (
  "marketcap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketcap entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the marketcap belongs to */,
  "marketcap" INTEGER /* Market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketcap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketcaps_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the analysis was performed on */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., regression, correlation) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the prediction was made from */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., forecast, classification) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_perf" (
  "model_perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance entry */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction the model performance belongs to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model performance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model performance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_perf_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_params" (
  "model_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction the model parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the model parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the model parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_params_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the change belongs to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insertion, deletion, update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the change was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the change was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the group (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "group_id")
)
